calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2005 Continued To Jun-21-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for three Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Karen Hull, Esq. for Petitioner: Jin Lan Tan, present as Guardian at litem for: Herman Zhu; Herman Zhu and Elaine Zhu, minor Claimants, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Joy Wu.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved as follows:
As to minor: Herman Zhu, Settlement $12,700.00; Attorney's Fees $3,175.00; Balance of $9,525.00
As to minor: Hubert Zhu, Settlement $10,600.00; Attorney's Fees $2,650.00; Balance of $7,950.00
As to minor: Elaine Zhu, Settlement $6,700.00; Attorney's Fees $1,675.00; Balance of $5,025.00
The balance for each minor to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, Chinatown Branch, 701 Grant Ave., San Francisco, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
